name: AI API Integration + Assistant Page Chat Integration
implemented: Structured EngineeringAIResponse validation after provider output
Scope-guard short-circuit for out-of-scope and ambiguous requests
Static placeholder engineering trace cards removed from /assistant
Structured response metadata displayed in assistant conversation
Future attachment/calculation/document/voice actions disabled and labeled
deferred: Project permission checks backed by database
safeBoundary: Live model integration is provider-gated and disabled by default. Deterministic fallback remains available for review without credentials. The assistant page uses the Phase 3 API but does not implement later-phase persistence, uploads, deterministic calculations, or production auth.
